name: Slack Approval to Merge
purpose: Receive Slack approval decisions and either merge approved PRs or queue revisions.
core_logic: Parse the Slack interaction payload and action value.

On approve, acknowledge Slack immediately, request a GitHub PR branch update, wait for required checks, then call the GitHub pull request merge endpoint using a dedicated GitHub HTTP bearer credential.
On request_changes, comment on the PR with a /codex revise request.
On block, comment on the PR and stop automation.
Return a compact webhook acknowledgement to Slack.
safe_failure_handling: Only merge when the PR number is present.
GitHub branch protection remains the final gate; failed required checks prevent merge.
Strict branch protection is handled by updating the PR branch before merge and allowing required checks time to attach.
An already-current PR branch response is allowed to continue into the merge path.
Do not send routine Slack messages from this workflow.
Deployment result workflow owns the completion notification.
